On-Camera Responsibilities Your primary goal is to keep the energy high and the "digital room" full. Product Storytelling: Introduce products not just by listing features, but by explaining how they solve a problem or fit into a lifestyle. Audience Interaction: Greet newcomers by name, answer live comments/questions, and create a sense of community. Call-to-Action (CTA): Gently push for sales by reminding viewers about limited-time coupons, low stock alerts, or "pinned" products in the basket. Brand Ambassadorship: Maintain the brand’s "voice" (e.g., professional for tech, cleaning enthusiasm for Karcher , or expert-led for skincare). ## 2. Off-Camera & Prep Work Success in a live stream is often determined before the camera starts rolling. Scripting & Show Flow: Assist in writing "hooks" (the first 10 seconds of a stream) and planning the order of products to be showcased. Product Deep-Dive: Study the technical specs, ingredients, or sizing of products so you can answer questions without hesitation. Visual Merchandising: Set up the background/studio to look appealing and organize the physical samples you’ll be holding. Technical Setup: In smaller teams, you might help set up lighting, ring lights, and microphones, or manage the streaming software (like TikTok Shop or Shopee Live). ## 3. Post-Stream & Analytics Performance Review: Look at metrics like Peak Concurrent Viewers (PCV) , average watch time, and click-through rates (CTR) to see what worked. On-Camera Responsibilities Your primary goal is to keep the energy high and the "digital room" full. Product Storytelling: Introduce products not just by listing features, but by explaining how they solve a problem or fit into a lifestyle. Audience Interaction: Greet newcomers by name, answer live comments/questions, and create a sense of community. Call-to-Action (CTA): Gently push for sales by reminding viewers about limited-time coupons, low stock alerts, or "pinned" products in the basket. Brand Ambassadorship: Maintain the brand’s "voice" (e.g., professional for tech, cleaning enthusiasm for Karcher , or expert-led for skincare). ## 2. Off-Camera & Prep Work Success in a live stream is often determined before the camera starts rolling. Scripting & Show Flow: Assist in writing "hooks" (the first 10 seconds of a stream) and planning the order of products to be showcased. Product Deep-Dive: Study the technical specs, ingredients, or sizing of products so you can answer questions without hesitation. Visual Merchandising: Set up the background/studio to look appealing and organize the physical samples you’ll be holding. Technical Setup: In smaller teams, you might help set up lighting, ring lights, and microphones, or manage the streaming software (like TikTok Shop or Shopee Live). ## 3. Post-Stream & Analytics Performance Review: Look at metrics like Peak Concurrent Viewers (PCV) , average watch time, and click-through rates (CTR) to see what worked. Content Clipping: Identify "golden moments" from the live stream to be edited into short-form videos (Reels/TikToks) for additional reach. Community Management: Follow up on comments or common questions that weren't addressed during the live session.

Hiring an experienced WordPress developer to build a Beaver Builder site and implement a WPForms to Zapier to Notion automation system. subClassification: Developer/Programmer Developer/Programmer classification: Teknologi Informasi & Komunikasi (Teknologi Informasi & Komunikasi) 2 hari yang lalu 2 hari yang lalu Title: Senior WordPress Developer (Beaver Builder + Zapier Automation) Overview We are looking for an experienced WordPress developer to execute a fully defined website build using Beaver Builder, along with a WPForms → Zapier → Notion automation workflow. This is a spec-driven project; all design, wireframes, copy, and implementation guides are already complete. Your role is to execute cleanly, accurately, and efficiently . If you are someone who follows instructions precisely, builds high-quality responsive sites, and has hands-on experience with Zapier-based workflows, this will be a great fit. Job Duties: 1. WordPress Build (Beaver Builder) Build ~8 pages based on a detailed row-by-row implementation guide Use Beaver Builder (including Theme Builder where applicable) Ensure full mobile responsiveness across devices Implement: Filterable gallery (FooGallery or similar) JavaScript-based pricing calculator Corporate leasing / structured content section Apply global header and footer across all pages 2. Form & Automation Workflow Set up and validate the following pipeline: WPForms → Zapier → Notion → Email Alerts Configure WPForms with proper field structure Connect forms to Zapier (webhook or native integration) Map and transform fields correctly Push data into a Notion database Trigger near real-time email alerts (~60 seconds) Handle edge cases and ensure no data loss 3. Testing & QA End-to-end testing of the full submission flow Validate: Form submissions Zapier execution Notion data creation Email notification timing Fix bugs and ensure system reliability before handover 4. Performance & Final Delivery Optimize for PageSpeed and performance Clean, maintainable build (no hacks or shortcuts) Final QA and smooth handover Requirements 5+ years of WordPress development experience Strong experience with Beaver Builder (including Theme Builder) Proven experience with WPForms + Zapier integrations Experience working with Notion as a database (via Zapier) Solid understanding of: Field mapping and conditional logic API/webhook-based workflows Responsive design best practices Ability to follow detailed implementation guides precisely Strong QA and debugging skills Nice to Have Experience building calculators with JavaScript Familiarity with gallery plugins like FooGallery Performance optimization experience (Core Web Vitals) Important This is not a design role . All assets and specifications are provided. We are looking for someone who can execute with precision, speed, and reliability . We are ready to move quickly and are looking to start immediately.
